gate.name: SchemaAndContracts
gate.passCondition: All schema and contract tests green with negative fixtures.

gate.name: PolicyAndSecurity
gate.passCondition: No critical unresolved policy or security violations.

gate.name: ContextIntegrity
gate.passCondition: Context compression and handoff checks green.

gate.name: PromptQuality
gate.passCondition: All execution prompts satisfy required framework fields with zero contradictions.

gate.name: MigrationReadiness
gate.passCondition: Migration dry-run approved and rollback plan validated.

scoringModel.metric: Capability and test coverage across all planned domains.
Failure recovery and lifecycle stability under stress.
Replay stability and predictable execution behavior.
Migration quality, docs readiness, and release controls.

goNoGoPolicy.rule: Any failed hard gate equals no-go.
Minimum weighted score for go recommendation is 90.
